summary: Applied surgical seam polish for boundary continuity: carried forward the overnight storm context from Chapter 10 at entry and clarified the Chapter 11 exit timeline to bridge into Chapter 12's later-night hospital return.

Revised the final sentence to reference the nine-thirty public-facing pressure and Lena returning to Beau after dark, matching the next-chapter handoff.
